query:
-- The most recent real call (019cff18) created lead in session 750002 but was linked to 720008
-- Fix it to point to the most recent session for that phone
UPDATE voice_calls 
SET sessionId = 750002
WHERE vapiCallId = '019cff18-92d1-7ffb-9263-d5ed5ce2fb54';

-- Verify
SELECT id, vapiCallId, sessionId, outcome, createdAt 
FROM voice_calls 
WHERE callerPhone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
